title: Zomb's PvP Optimization
description: A lightweight, client-side Fabric modpack built to maximize FPS and optimize competitive PvP.
body:

# ⚔️ Zomb's PvP Optimization

This is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack made for anyone looking to play competitive PvP without dealing with frame drops or input lag. The main goal is to keep your gameplay as smooth as possible and clear up your screen visibility during intense fights.

## 📦 What's inside:

* 📈 **Stable FPS & Smoothness:** Deep optimization under the hood to eliminate stuttering and maximize your frame rate. The pack easily handles heavy shaders like Complementary Reimagined while keeping your FPS high.
* 🎯 **Smart Hitboxes:** Customize your hitbox colors and outlines so you know exactly when your hits are landing.
* 👁️ **BactroMod QoL Tweaks:** Built-in tweaks to lower the fire and shield overlays on your screen, keeping your view completely clear when you are in a fight.
* ⚙️ **Accessible Mod Menu:** Every single performance feature and tweak can be easily customized directly from the clean in-game menu.
* ✨ **...and much more!** The pack also includes dozens of smaller mods for fixing memory leaks, network optimizations, and client-side quality-of-life tweaks that are completely safe to use on multiplayer servers.

---

If you enjoy the pack and want to stay updated on future releases and tutorials, check out my channel:
